content: fitdecode vs fitparse: fitdecode is a rewrite with error_handling argument for malformed files, thread-safety, and optional CRC checking (can ignore CRC for faster parsing). Zwift FIT files include manufacturer-specific fields under developer data fields; fitdecode handles these by returning unknown field names rather than crashing. Key edge cases: truncated files (partial upload), zero-length records, missing GPS fields (indoor trainer), power=0 for entire record (paused), and files with only HR (no power). Always check for field existence before accessing.
